message: I am the Evolution Scholar of Illystrius. Bring me beast relics and I shall evolve them.
I can evolve Shadow Serpent into Thunder Kraken.
I can evolve Thunder Kraken into Storm Griffin.
I can evolve Frozen Leviathan into Frozen Wolf.
I can evolve Frozen Wolf into Mystic Cyclops.
I can evolve Lunar Tiger into Void Wyvern.
I can evolve Void Wyvern into Mystic Chimera.
I can evolve Shadow Phoenix into Void Basilisk.

I can evolve Celestial Cyclops into Mystic Specter.

I can evolve Lunar Phoenix into Frozen Drake.
I can evolve Crystal Phoenix into Astral Wolf.

Choose a beast evolution.
